jsonLd.title: MyGlamm is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MyGlamm! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MyGlamm:
MyGlamm is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
